_comment: Tier-1 mcp_tool source presets for egeria-mcp (AU-KG.ingest.mcp-tool-connector). Syncs Egeria open-metadata records into the KG as documents via this package's MCP server. Contributed presets win over the central MCP_TOOL_PRESETS. The typed-node + lineage path is the native egeria_ingest_catalog tool (egeria_mcp.kg_ingest); these presets cover the hub-driven document sync.
